inherited_evidence: Prior fixed 3bp single-asset carry: BTC development +23.13%, BTC evaluation +5.35%, BNB confirmation +9.04%, conclusion INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE
question: Can a same-venue one-asset-at-a-time cash-and-carry rule requiring two consecutive settled funding rates >=3bp cover basis and two-leg costs across time and fresh instruments?
entry: flat; current and previous settled funding >=3bp; choose highest current rate, symbol ascending tie-break
exit: after selected symbol settled funding <=0, after counting that funding; sample-end forced exit
capital: two fully funded units; equal initial spot long and perpetual short; all PnL divided by two
development_gate: complete event/price alignment; base/stress return >0; >=10 episodes and >=100 active intervals; episode median >0; win rate >=50%; max noncompounded drawdown >-10%
evaluation_gate: base/stress return >0; >=3 episodes and >=30 active intervals; episode median >=0; max drawdown >-10%
confirmation_gate: base/stress return >0; >=10 episodes and >=100 active intervals; both symbols selected; episode median >=0; max drawdown >-10%
holdout_release_rule: Fetch evaluation only after development passes; fetch confirmation only after evaluation passes
study_code_revision_reason: Data-integrity-only revision after analysis reported 15 XRP funding boundaries without archive prices: fill only missing 8h timestamps from official public Spot and USD-M Kline REST, bind hashes into the manifest, and preserve original manifest/results. Economic rules and gates are unchanged.
